faqs.question: What types of spiders are common in Forest Hills homes?
faqs.answer: Forest Hills residents typically encounter house spiders, cellar spiders, jumping spiders, and occasionally wolf spiders. While most are harmless, they can multiply quickly in basements, attics, and garages. Our spider control service identifies the species and implements targeted treatment to eliminate current infestations and prevent future ones.
